name: [GRIDHAND] Payment Chaser Agent - Invoice created → due in 3 days → reminder SMS

gridhand.scenario: Invoice created → due in 3 days → reminder SMS
gridhand.description: When an invoice is created in your accounting system, such as QuickBooks, and it's due for payment in three days, GRIDHAND's automation workflow is triggered, sending a reminder SMS to your customer via a integrated messaging service like Twilio, with a personalized message that includes the invoice amount and due date. This reminder is sent at 8am on the day the invoice becomes overdue, ensuring your customer is aware of the pending payment and can take immediate action to settle their account. By automating this process, you can reduce late payments and improve cash flow for your business, freeing up more time to focus on serving your customers and growing your revenue.
